GLS.module.title: GLUniverse Suite
GLS.config.menu.name: Control Center
GLS.config.menu.label: Open Control Center
GLS.config.menu.hint: Enable, disable and configure every module in the GLUniverse Suite from one place.
GLS.config.title: GLUniverse Suite — Control Center
GLS.config.intro: Enable or disable each module and tune its settings here. Features that need a specific game system or companion feature unlock automatically when present.
GLS.config.reloadNote: Settings apply instantly. Enabling or disabling a feature applies after a reload.
GLS.config.suite.title: GLUniverse Suite
GLS.config.suite.hint: Suite-wide preferences that apply to your screen only.
GLS.config.uiScale.name: Interface Scale
GLS.config.uiScale.hint: Resize every GLUniverse Suite window, HUD and overlay together. Affects only your screen.
GLS.config.introPlayer: Personalize the GLUniverse Suite for your screen. These preferences affect only you — your GM controls which features are enabled.
GLS.config.playerNote: Your preferences save instantly and apply to your screen only.
GLS.migration.done: GLUniverse Suite: imported settings from your previously-installed standalone modules.
GLS.feature.clocks-tracker.title: Clocks & Tracker
GLS.feature.clocks-tracker.hint: Core engine: in-game calendar and time HUD. Trackers, weather, support and delving are separate features below.
GLS.feature.clocks-trackers.title: Resource Trackers
GLS.feature.clocks-trackers.hint: GM-managed clocks, points, pools and hazard trackers shown in a dockable HUD.
GLS.feature.clocks-weather.title: Weather
GLS.feature.clocks-weather.hint: Hex Flower weather engine with a calendar-driven forecast and announcement cards.
GLS.feature.clocks-support.title: Mission Support
GLS.feature.clocks-support.hint: Support-NPC roster and the Comms-Coin HUD with passive token effects.
GLS.feature.clocks-delving.title: Delving Mode
GLS.feature.clocks-delving.hint: Turn-driven dungeon delve: a turn counter and a degrading delving-resource HUD.
GLS.feature.initiative.title: Initiative
GLS.feature.initiative.hint: Premium combat initiative tracker overlay with condition badges and turn markers.
GLS.feature.flatfinder.title: Flatfinder (PF2e)
GLS.feature.flatfinder.hint: Surfaces flat-footed / off-guard conditions and competence in PF2e combat.
GLS.feature.destiny-dice.title: Destiny Dice (PF2e)
GLS.feature.destiny-dice.hint: A cinematic Destiny/Fate die for PF2e checks and rerolls.
GLS.feature.pf2e-ultimates.title: PF2e Combat Engines & Ultimates
GLS.feature.pf2e-ultimates.hint: Build NPC Signature, Trigger, Engine, and charge-powered Ultimate abilities with a cinematic token indicator.
GLS.feature.insight.title: Insight
GLS.feature.insight.hint: Passive, broadcastable on-screen notifications and cues.
GLS.feature.stage.title: Stage
GLS.feature.stage.hint: Visual-novel presenter: actor portraits, dialogue and comms overlays.
GLS.feature.stream-pacer.title: Stream Pacer
GLS.feature.stream-pacer.hint: GM/player pacing HUD: countdowns, spotlight, hand-raise and peril cues.
GLS.feature.statsblock-import.title: PF2e Stat Block Importer
GLS.feature.statsblock-import.hint: Import PF2e NPCs and hazards from pasted stat-block text.
GLS.feature.loot-gen.title: Loot Generator
GLS.feature.loot-gen.hint: System-aware loot generation and audited treasure proposals.
GLS.feature.cargo-grid.title: Cargo Grid
GLS.feature.cargo-grid.hint: Polyomino cargo-packing board for ships, caravans and inventories.
GLS.feature.tidy5e-slots.title: Tidy 5e Inventory Slots
GLS.feature.tidy5e-slots.hint: Slot-based encumbrance and wear-and-tear for the Tidy 5e sheet.
GLS.feature.pf2e-flatten.title: Flatten Proficiency (PF2e)
GLS.feature.pf2e-flatten.hint: Proficiency Without Level variant rule automation for PF2e.
GLS.feature.pf2e-level-zero.title: Level 0 Characters (PF2e)
GLS.feature.pf2e-level-zero.hint: Adds native-sheet setup and automation for PF2e level-0 PCs and apprentice characters.

GL0.title: Level 0 Character
GL0.subtitle: Before the adventure begins
GL0.summary: PF2e supplies the four free ability boosts and ancestry HP + Constitution at level 0. This tab supplies the variant's missing proficiencies and optional apprentice benefits.

warning.class: This level-0 PC still has a Class item. Remove it from the native sheet; apprentice benefits do not use a full class item.

initial.title: Initial Proficiencies
initial.fixed: Trained automatically: Perception, Fortitude, Reflex, Will, unarmed attacks, and unarmored defense.

skills.label: Initial trained skills ({chosen}/{required})
skills.hint: Choose 2 + Intelligence modifier skills. Background and apprentice skills are granted separately.

apprentice.title: Apprentice Option
apprentice.alchemistHint: Advanced alchemy level 1, one batch of infused reagents each day, and infused alchemical items only.
apprentice.monkHint: Grants the native PF2e Powerful Fist class feature.
apprentice.martialHint: Trained in light armor, all simple weapons, and the chosen martial weapon.
apprentice.spellcasterHint: Trained in the chosen tradition and gains exactly two fixed cantrips.

money.title: Starting Money
money.rule: A level-0 PC starts with 5 gp. Adventures through 1st level should distribute another 10 gp per PC.
money.confirm: Add 5 gp to {name}? This is additive and can be done once through this tab.

gameplay.title: Gameplay & Advancement
gameplay.rule: Combat is especially dangerous. For encounter building, the GM can treat this PC as level -1. For a short level-0 arc, consider advancing at 800 XP; for a longer arc, advance to Apprentice before 1st level.

error.martialWeapon: Choose one martial weapon for this apprentice.
error.cantrip: Drop a PF2e cantrip into this slot.
error.sync: Level 0 automation could not be updated: {message}

effect.name: Level 0 Proficiencies
effect.description: Provides the initial proficiencies and optional apprentice benefits from the Level 0 Characters variant rule.

GL0.powerfulFistMissing: The PF2e Powerful Fist class feature could not be found.

GLS.feature.critical.title: Critical
GLS.feature.critical.hint: JRPG-style cinematic critical-hit and critical-success animations.
GLS.feature.etched-chat.title: Etched-Glass Chat Theme (PF2e)
GLS.feature.etched-chat.hint: Restyle PF2e chat cards in the suite's Etched Glass aesthetic, with a disposition-colored glass fracture on critical rolls. Overrides Dorako UI's chat theme.
